input:
INTERNAL — LEGAL SENSITIVITY
Property: frontline golf apartment, Sotogrande, 2 bed / 2 bath.
Owner: Petra K., German national, investor.
Matrimonial dispute — estranged husband has initiated proceedings
in Frankfurt family court to freeze Spanish assets. Her solicitor
advises completing any sale within 90 days before the German court
order can be enforced in Spain under EU regulations.
She has accepted an offer verbally at €385,000 but the buyer
pulled out. Will accept any offer above €360,000 now.
Balcony railing has a structural issue flagged in a 2024 inspection
report she never shared with us formally. We noticed it on site visit.
Categories: C2 (matrimonial/court freeze), C3 (floor €360k, lapsed offer history), C4 (railing defect from undisclosed report), C8 (90-day legal deadline)
output:
TAGS: [Frontline golf views] [Negotiation margin available] [Motivated seller] [Renovation budget advised] [Exclusive listing]

DESCRIPTION: This elegant two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment offers premium frontline golf views in the heart of Sotogrande. It is an ideal retreat for golf enthusiasts seeking a sophisticated and tranquil Mediterranean lifestyle. This property is available for immediate consideration following a recent change in market availability.
